title: Dr. Beckmann Service-it Power Descaler, 100g
features: Dr. Beckmann Service-it Power Descaler cuts through limescale build up fast with its incredibly strong active-power formula.
Helps prevent breakdowns and maintain reliable machine performance for longer
Suitable for all washing machines and dishwashers
Also descales invisible machine parts e.g. tubes and heating rods
How to apply: Add the contents of one or both sachets to the machine and start the 60° C cycle (See description for details)
description: Product Description Limescale deposits on concealed parts inside appliances can effect reduced performance and can lead to increased energy consumption. Dr. Beckmann Machine Descaler eliminates stubborn limescale build-up up to 2x more effectively than pure citric acid (under identical application conditions). Regular use can therefore prevent malfunctioning and maintain the performance of your appliance - saving on both repair and energy costs. DIRECTIONS FOR USE: In washing machines: Pour content of both sachets directly into the drum, set wash program to 60°C without prewash and start wash cycle. In dishwashers: Fill the dosing compartment to the maximum level with the powder from one sachet, sprinkling any excess powder over the floor of the machine's interior. Set machine to min. 60°C rinse program ideally without prewash and start wash cycle. Recommendation: Use regularly - every 3months recommended. Please follow the manufacturer's instructions. Store in a cool and dry place. Important Information: - To protect and maintain the machine, use regularly - between 2 to 4 times a year (depending on frequency of use and water hardness). - Only use the product in empty machines. - Once the washing or rinse program has finished, the machine is ready for immediate use. - Please follow the manufacturer's instructions.
